_comment: Regis Energy Partners active projects. Edit this file to update map. Coords come from Apr 17 Lobo Memo (Sumlin), Apr 10 POI email (Price), Feb 11 Portfolio Overview deck (Carswell, Fisher), and city centroids for Elko + Kubiak (precise coords pending).

projects.name: Sumlin
projects.stage: Executed LOA: 300 MW N. Laredo Switch + 500 MW Lobo pending
projects.note: Lobo Substation / Project Site on FM 255, ~5 mi north of Laredo, Webb County. Executed AEP LOA for 300 MW via North Laredo Switch (Q1 2029 / Q2 2030 ISD). Lobo 500 MW secondary request pending (Apr 17 2026 memo). Hachar Family Trust: 688 ac primary + 1,198 ac expansion = 1,886 ac. EXACT coordinate from Lobo 500 MW memo.

projects.name: Price
projects.note: Hill County, TX. 1.5 GW BTM Gas + Grid target. Sam Switch POI delivered Apr 10 2026 by Donald. EXACT coordinate from Regis POI email. Master KMZ: /Price (Hillsboro)/10 - KMZ & GIS/Price_Master_KMZ_2026-04-09_agent.kmz.

projects.name: Carswell
projects.note: 7 miles SW of Corsicana, TX (Navarro County) - NOT Fort Worth/Carswell AFB. Substation S+W of Corsicana, adjacent to Riot Blockchain facility. 622 ac pursuing LOI + 100+ ac expansion w/ multiple landowners. Oncor 345kV + Atmos 10.75-inch pipeline. 1.5 GW target (300 MW BTM gas by 2028, 250 MW grid expanding). EXACT coordinate from Feb 11 2026 Regis Portfolio Overview.

projects.name: Elko
projects.note: Tri-County substation, Schertz, TX (Guadalupe County, NE San Antonio). Flagged INFERENCE project (not full data center) per Regis Fee Breakdown. City centroid approximate - Tri-County substation precise coord still needed (pending Donald). Planned 250 MW.

projects.name: Fisher
projects.note: 1 mile SW of Lockhart, TX (Caldwell County - NOT Fisher County; DC Land Sheet was stale). Served by BBEC (Bluebonnet EC). 327 ac LOI in negotiation + 579 ac expansion w/ 2 landowners. Kinder Morgan 42-inch + Energy Transfer 20-inch gas pipelines adjacent. LCRA 345kV. 1.5 GW target (287 MW BTM gas 2028, 40-74 MW grid expanding). 25 mi from Austin Bergstrom. EXACT coordinate from Feb 11 2026 Regis Portfolio Overview.

projects.name: Kubiak
projects.note: Houston, TX (Harris County). 1,200 MW target on CenterPoint 345kV. Per Apr 11 2026 assessment: NO lead, NO land, NO model clarity (32% probability of success). Strong macro fundamentals (Houston gas liquidity, labor, fiber, water) but worst execution status. Houston centroid used as placeholder pin until land is identified.
